steps.title: Identify the scaling relationship
steps.content: We're given a maximum of 92 trees per acre. Since the number of trees scales proportionally with acreage, we multiply the per-acre maximum by the total number of acres.

steps.title: Calculate the total for 2 acres
steps.content:
$$92 \times 2 = 184 \text{ trees}$$

That matches choice B — B is correct.
